title: Disciple of the Warden
description: A mod that allows you to play with a sculk/warden based spellcaster role.
body:
## Power up by consuming sculk and killing your enemies (and friends!) to use the new warden-inspired weapons:
- Harmonic Staff, which allows you to fire a sonic boom at the targeted enemy for 3 power levels
- Seismic Horn, which allows you to blast away and darken the vision of entities within several blocks for 10 power levels
- Sacrificial Sword, which scales up to 15 damage based on your current power level. A disciple's last line of defence, using it will not consume power (but may have other side effects >:3)
## The power guide
- The power needed to use the weapons can be attained by killing non-warden mobs with the Sacrificial Sword
- Or by using the Power of the Disciple item with sculk in your inventory
